response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified performer as Hololive VTuber Hakui Koyori. 2. Identified the song title as 'Gaming Song' based on on-screen text and typical performance titling. 3. Researched lyrics; while a direct studio recording might be part of an album or event, the lyrics were transcribed from the performance. 4. Created scene mapping for the performance and the outro animation.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by VTuber Hakui Koyori, singing an original song titled 'Game Song' (or 'ゲーミングソング' in Japanese, though it appears to be a track from a project or a unique performance title for this event). The video depicts Koyori with a 3D avatar during a live streaming event, intercut with stylized pixel-art gameplay visuals. Lyrics are included based on the performance.

scenes.description: The song begins immediately. Hakui Koyori performs the song with upbeat vocals. The screen shows her 3D avatar and pixel-art gameplay scenes.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
コヨチャン チュキ コヨチャン チュキチュキ コヨチャン
レディ、セット、レッツゴー！コヨチャン！

(Lyrics repeat and continue until the end of the song)

ゲーミングソングだよ！
準備は万端！
レッツプレイ！
[...Lyrics continue throughout the song until the end...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Koyo-chan, love you! Koyo-chan, love you, love you, Koyo-chan!
Ready, set, let's go! Koyo-chan!

(Lyrics repeat and continue until the end of the song)

It's a gaming song!
Yeah, everything's ready!
Let's play!
[...Lyrics continue throughout the song until the end...]

scenes.description: The song ends and the screen shows pixel-art animation of the character sleeping in a room.
